bird.name: 聖誕島栗鷹鴞
bird.summary: 聖誕島栗鷹鴞（Ninox natalis）是一種貓頭鷹，聖誕島上的特有種。牠們棲息在亞熱帶或熱帶的低地潮濕森林及叢林。牠們受到失去棲息地的威脅。 參考 外部連結 BirdLife Species Factsheet

relations.subject: 聖誕島栗鷹鴞
relations.evidence: Man-made habitat destruction together with the introduction of species such as the yellow crazy ant (Anoplolepis gracillipes), cats (Felis catus) and black rats are among the major threats to both the habitat and native wildlife, including the Christmas Island hawk-owl
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
